channel.title: Global Dispatch: Shadow of Trust
channel.itunes:author: Eslam
channel.description: Investigative reports into the world's most dangerous secrets and global crises.
channel.item:
<<<<<<< Updated upstream Beyond Deception: The Dark Side of Romance Scams #RomanceScams #BetrayalOfTrust #OnlineSafety (Ep. v8) This podcast episode explores the dark side of romance scams and the betrayal of trust that comes with them. We delve into four unique stories of romance scams, highlighting the devastating consequences of these crimes and the importance of being cautious when meeting people online.
🔍 Keywords: romance scams, online safety, betrayal of trust, dating sites, social media
#RomanceScams #BetrayalOfTrust #OnlineSafety #DatingSites #SocialMedia Sat, 04 Apr 2026 10:13:03 +0000 ======= Love in the Dark: Exposing Romance Scams #RomanceScams #BetrayalOfTrust #OnlineDating (Ep. v8) This podcast episode explores the world of romance scams and the betrayal of trust that comes with them. We'll hear from victims, experts, and former scammers to shed light on this growing problem and provide tips on how to avoid falling prey to these scams.
🔍 Keywords: romance scams, online dating, betrayal of trust, social media, Nigeria, psychology, counseling, law enforcement
#RomanceScams #BetrayalOfTrust #OnlineDating #SocialMedia #Nigeria #Psychology #Counseling #LawEnforcement Sat, 04 Apr 2026 10:14:23 +0000 >>>>>>> Stashed changes yes
v8

item.title: Shadow of Trust: Global Dispatch Episode
item.description: New investigative report on global trends and hidden truths.

item.title: Shadow of Trust: The Antarctica Betrayal
item.itunes:author: Eslam
item.description: Deep dive into the hidden truth behind the polar disaster.
